Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Impose Additional Sanctions For Failure To Obey Order Jan 20, 2006
Off Calendar Apr-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Glenn Winston's Motion For Order To Impose Additional Sanctions For Failure To Obey Order of January 20, 2006 is denied. The remedy to collect sanctions is to reduce the order to judgment. See Midwife v Bernal (1988) 203 Cal.App.3d 57 and Jones v. Otero (1984) 156 Cal.App.3d 754. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Impose Sanctions For Abuse Of The Discovery Process
Off Calendar Apr-06-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Glenn Winston's Motion For Order To Impose Sanctions For Abuse Of Discovery Process Against Defendant is denied. The court does not find that there are grounds for finding that there is a litigation sanction that attaches to the conduct described in the motion. While the motion is not denied for this reason, the court also advises Plaintiff that the proof of service must indicate service upon counsel for Defendant. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
